hooks.command: jq -r '.prompt // ""' | grep -qiE "(architect|system design|major refactor|infrastructure|scalabilit|deep reasoning|redesign complet|fundamental change|database schema|migration plan|tech stack|security audit|performance overhaul)" && printf '{"systemMessage":"[OPUS 4.6 SUGGESTED] Architectural or complex task detected — for deeper reasoning, switch with: /model claude-opus-4-6"}' || printf '{}'
